name: Saudi Indian Company for Cooperative Insurance Wafa Insurance
summary: Saudi Indian Company for Cooperative Insurance Wafa Insurance provides general insurance, health insurance, and protection and savings products in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company operates through Motor, Health, and Other segments. It offers property, accident, and liability insurance comprising fire, property damage, business interruption, personal accident, fidelity, money, theft and burglary, comprehensive general liability, workmen's compensation, medical malpractice, and medical insurance products; comprehensive and third party motor insurance products; and marine cargo insurance products. The company's products also include engineering insurance, such as machinery breakdown, contractor's all risk, contractor's plant and machinery, erection all risks, and electronics equipment insurance products; medical insurance; individual protection and saving products; and individual and group protection plans, as well as a range of reinsurance products and services. Saudi Indian Company for Cooperative Insurance Wafa Insurance is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
